name: bandit.roof_z_dispatch_fallback_mcw
description: Live roof/tower-z dispatch fallback proof: a scout-confirmed remembered bandit lead points at an elevated z target id/OMT while the currently reachable approach coordinate is on ground. The scenario waits through the real 30-minute overmap dispatch cadence and requires same-run artifacts plus saved state showing dispatch kept the elevated target id but routed to the ground OMT rather than route_missing/throttle silence.

steps.label: post_load_roof_z_lead_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the roof-z remembered-lead fixture; this proves startup/load and fixture footing only

steps.label: preflight_saved_roof_z_camp_map_lead
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the persisted roof-z remembered lead contract
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains an inactive camp with a scout-confirmed remembered elevated/tower-z lead targeting player@140,39,5 before live cadence proof starts

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_roof_z_dispatch_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player chose a bounded 30-minute wait; feature credit is deferred to same-run roof-z dispatch artifacts and saved active-state proof, not OCR of the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks roof-z remembered-lead dispatch planning plus a ground live_dispatch_goal, this scenario is inconclusive/red.

steps.label: audit_no_route_missing_for_roof_z_dispatch
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug delta showed route_missing or 30-minute-throttle silence after the roof-z remembered target

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_roof_z_dispatch
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the roof-z dispatch probe

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_roof_z_dispatch
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the roof-z dispatch probe

steps.label: audit_saved_roof_z_dispatch_state
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not persist an active dispatch for the roof-z remembered target
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world contains an active stalk dispatch for player@140,39,5 with concrete active members

steps.label: audit_roof_z_ground_dispatch_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show roof-z target identity, remembered-lead source, and reachable ground live_dispatch_goal

evidence_contract.claim: a roof/elevated-z remembered target does not strand bandit dispatch on route_missing/throttle silence; the real 30-minute live cadence dispatches to the roof-z target id while routing via reachable ground OMT first
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for roof-z dispatch behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No roof-z dispatch credit unless startup/load, saved preflight roof-z lead, real wait/cadence action, same-run dispatch-plan artifact, absent route_missing/throttle-silence guard, save/writeback, and saved active dispatch state are all green/matched.
